steps.title: Locate the turning point
steps.content: The vertex of a quadratic graph is its turning point. On the shown graph, the parabola opens upward, so the vertex is the lowest point.

steps.title: Read the coordinates
steps.content:
The lowest point is on the y-axis at $x=0$ and has y-coordinate $2$. So the vertex is $(0,2)$.
The answer is C.
